query:
ALTER TABLE `properties`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `yearBuilt` int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastRenovation` date DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `floorNumber` int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `parkingSpaces` int DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `furnished` enum('furnished','semi_furnished','unfurnished') DEFAULT 'unfurnished',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `electricityAccount` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `waterAccount` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `roi` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `vacancyLoss` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `marketRent` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastInspectionDate` date DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `nextInspectionDate` date DEFAULT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Mt2rCbAQLnPWFL.bdd25ffc5b42 --database EGvRBfpqPGe26TFrJFv9dm --execute 
ALTER TABLE `properties`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `yearBuilt` int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastRenovation` date DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `floorNumber` int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `parkingSpaces` int DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `furnished` enum('furnished','semi_furnished','unfurnished') DEFAULT 'unfurnished',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `electricityAccount` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `waterAccount` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `roi` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `vacancyLoss` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `marketRent` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastInspectionDate` date DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `nextInspectionDate` date DEFAULT NULL;
